data.overview: Chuyện nói về một anh chàng với tuổi thơ bắt đầu năm sáu tuổi, anh giết vua quỷ Swallow Sky Clam. Là một phù thủy tu luyện toàn năng, Tiên vương phải che giấu sức mạnh của mình và sống giữa một nhóm sinh viên tu luyện bình thường.

data.biography:
范明，1964年10月12日出生于江苏省徐州市，祖籍山东省临沂市，国家一级演员，导演。

1995年，参演首部电视作品《七战七捷》。2003年，凭借情景喜剧《炊事班的故事》中的副班长“老高”一角，获得第十六届金星奖最佳男演员奖。2005年在《武林外传》中饰演刑捕头。2008年主演《派出所的故事》。2010年，凭借《手机》获得安徽卫视国剧盛典现场-最佳男配角奖。2013年，主演电视剧《美丽的契约》。2014年，主演电视剧《老爸太囧》。2015年9月9日，出演的都市现代励志剧《真心想让你幸福》。2016年，主演都市情感轻喜剧《主妇也要拼》。
data.name: 范明

data.biography:
范明，1964 年 10 月 12 日出生於江蘇省徐州市，祖籍山東省臨沂市，國家一級演員，導演。

1995 年，參演首部電視作品《七戰七捷》。2003 年，憑藉情景喜劇《炊事班的故事》中的副班長“老高”一角，獲得第十六屆金星獎最佳男演員獎。2005 年在《武林外傳》中飾演刑捕頭。2008 年主演《派出所的故事》。2010 年，憑藉《手機》獲得安徽衞視國劇盛典現場 - 最佳男配角獎。2013 年，主演電視劇《美麗的契約》。2014 年，主演電視劇《老爸太囧》。2015 年 9 月 9 日，出演的都市現代勵志劇《真心想讓你幸福》。2016 年，主演都市情感輕喜劇《主婦也要拼》。
data.name: 范明

data.biography:
范明，1964 年 10 月 12 日出生於江蘇省徐州市，祖籍山東省臨沂市，國家一級演員，導演。

1995 年，參演首部電視作品《七戰七捷》。2003 年，憑藉情景喜劇《炊事班的故事》中的副班長“老高”一角，獲得第十六屆金星獎最佳男演員獎。2005 年在《武林外傳》中飾演刑捕頭。2008 年主演《派出所的故事》。2010 年，憑藉《手機》獲得安徽衞視國劇盛典現場 - 最佳男配角獎。2013 年，主演電視劇《美麗的契約》。2014 年，主演電視劇《老爸太囧》。2015 年 9 月 9 日，出演的都市現代勵志劇《真心想讓你幸福》。2016 年，主演都市情感輕喜劇《主婦也要拼》。

data.biography:
J.D. was born in the delta town of Greenville, Mississippi (also the birthplace of Muppets creator Jim Henson) on the same day Richard Nixon was elected president. He is of Irish-French-German-Cherokee-Choctaw decent, the oldest of 7 siblings, and attended 17 different schools (public and private) while moving back and forth between his mother and father. His great-great-great-great uncle was Horace Mann, the founder of the American Public School system. His father (Puddin - yep, that's what they call him) is a welder/artist/amateur archaeologist and inventor. His mother (Sally) has had many professions, including concert promoter and owner of a country/western nightclub called The Headless Horseman, where as a young child, J.D. spent many school nights until the wee hours of the morning hanging out backstage and on stage with the likes of Hank Williams, Jr., Juice Newton, Jerry Lee Lewis, Johnny Paycheck, David Allen Coe, Ray Price, and many others.

After a short stint in college and a 15 month stint in the Marine Corps stationed at 29 Palms, California and after hanging out with some actors in L.A., J.D. thought he would give acting a shot. His only experience with acting had been playing the Prince in his pre-school production of The Nutcracker, and getting kicked out of his senior play, Oklahoma, after his second rehearsal because he and a friend drank a beer before hand. After the Marine Corps, he returned to Mississippi and worked as a debt collector for his mother's collection agency. After a year of hating his job, he decided to return to college and get a degree in theatre at The University of Southern Mississippi. Once on stage at college, he knew acting was what he had to do. His second year in theatre, he was one of 20 finalists in the state selected to attend SETC (Southeastern Theatre Conference). In 1995, a friend offered J.D. a $1,000 to come to Los Angeles and perform a lead role in his play "Dylan's Ghost" at the Morgan-Wixson Theatre in Santa Monica. J.D. took him up on the offer and left college a semester before graduating and since then has lived back and forth between Hollywood, California, Austin, Texas, and Oxford, Mississippi, where he just completed writing and directing his first independent feature Glorious Mail(2005).

Even though he appeared on the short-lived game show, Hollywood Showdown with Todd Newton and won nearly $12,000, his friends like to tell him that he's almost one lucky son of a gun. Mainly because he's come so close to landing lead roles in major films so many times, usually being the director's second choice. In 2004 his luck proved true once again when he purchased a $100 raffle ticket and was 1st Runner Up (2nd Choice) for a $250,000 house in United Way's New Home Giveaway, where instead he won an artist's print worth $80.  IMDb Mini Biography By: JDsMOM
data.name: J.D. Evermore

data.biography:
John Daniel Evermore (* 5. November 1968 in Greenville, Mississippi) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Nach einem kurzen Aufenthalt am College verpflichtete er sich für 15 Monate beim Marine Corps und wurde in Kalifornien stationiert. Nachdem er in Los Angeles einige Schauspieler kennengelernt hatte, erwachte sein Interesse an diesem Beruf. Nach einigen Gelegenheitsjobs studierte er Theater an der University of Southern Mississippi. Es folgten erste Engagements am Theater und später bei Film und Fernsehen.

Ab dem Jahr 2010 stellte er in der Fernsehserie Treme den Detective Thomas Silby dar. Von 2013 bis 2014 spielte er in Rectify die Rolle des Sheriff Carl Daggett. In der ersten Staffel der Serie True Detective war er als Detective Lutz zu sehen. Daneben übernahm er zahlreiche Nebenrollen in Spielfilmen wie Alabama Moon – Abenteuer Leben, Django Unchained, 12 Years a Slave, Dallas Buyers Club oder Planet der Affen: Revolution.
美国演员

data.overview: Thợ Săn Đồ Cũ (Storage Hunters) là một chương trình truyền hình Mỹ được khởi chiếu từ ngày 21/6/2011 trên TruTV.  Chương trình tập trung vào việc bán đấu giá đồ cũ của người bán đấu giá Sean Kelly và tương tác giữa những người đấu giá chính Brandon và Lori Bernier, Jesse McClure, Tarrell "T-Money" Wright, Ron "Papa Bear" Kirkpatrick, "Desert Dan" và người cắt khóa /  nhân viên bảo vệ, Cameron "Green Mile" Rowe.

data.biography:
Beau Christian Knapp (born April 17, 1989) is an American actor. He is known for his roles in The Signal (2014), Run All Night (2015), and Southpaw (2015). Knapp portrayed a lead villain in Death Wish (2018), the sixth installment of the Death Wish series. In 2021, he starred in the TV series adaptation of The Lost Symbol.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
data.name: Beau Knapp

data.biography: 博·克里斯蒂安·纳普（Beau Christian Knapp，1989年4月17日-），美国演员。他以在《信号》（2014 年）、《通宵奔跑》（2015 年）和《南爪》（2015 年）中的角色而闻名。克纳普在《死亡愿望》（2018 年）中饰演了一个主要反派，这是《死亡愿望》系列的第六部。2021年，他主演了改编自《失落的符号》的电视剧。
data.name: 博·纳普

data.biography: 博·克里斯蒂安·納普（Beau Christian Knapp，1989 年 4 月 17 日-），美國演員。他以在《訊號 信號》（2014 年）、《通宵奔跑》（2015 年）和《南爪》（2015 年）中的角色而聞名。克納普在《死亡願望》（2018 年）中飾演了一個主要反派，這是《死亡願望》系列的第六部。2021 年，他主演了改編自《失落的符號》的電視劇。
data.name: 博·納普

data.biography:
Beau Knapp (*17. April 1989 in Los Angeles, Kalifornien) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler. Er wurde durch seine Rollen in Filmen wie The Signal (2014), Southpaw (2015), The Finest Hours (2016) und Death Wish (2018) bekannt.

Knapp begann seine Schauspielkarriere 2009 mit dem Kurzfilm The J.H. Gunn Project. Zwei Jahre später hatte er eine Nebenrolle in J.J. Abrams’ Science-Fiction-Film Super 8 (2011). 2012 spielte er in No One Lives – Keiner überlebt! neben Luke Evans.

2014 übernahm er eine größere Rolle in The Signal an der Seite von Laurence Fishburne. Im darauffolgenden Jahr spielte er in Southpaw (2015) mit Jake Gyllenhaal und Run All Night (2015) mit Liam Neeson. 2016 war er in The Nice Guys mit Russell Crowe und Ryan Gosling sowie in The Finest Hours als Mel „Gus“ Gouthro zu sehen, einem Mitglied der Rettungscrew der US-Küstenwache.

In den folgenden Jahren spielte Knapp in Sand Castle (2017), Seven Seconds (2018) und Destroyer (2018) mit Nicole Kidman. 2018 übernahm er die Rolle des Knox in Death Wish, dem Remake des Klassikers mit Bruce Willis. Danach war er in American Skin (2019), Black and Blue (2019) und Mosquito State (2020) zu sehen.

Zu seinen jüngsten Projekten gehören The Bikeriders (2023), Road House (2024) und die Serie SEAL Team (2024), in der er Drew Franklin spielt.

Beau Christian Knapp, 17 Nisan 1989 tarihinde Los Angeles, Kaliforniya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Babası yapımcı Harry Knapp olan Beau, eğlence sektörünün içinde büyüdü ve erken yaşlarda oyunculuğa ilgi duymaya başladı. Kariyerine, J.J. Abrams'ın yönettiği bilimkurgu filmi "Super 8" (2011) ile etkileyici bir başlangıç yaptı. Bu ilk rolü, onun gelecekte Hollywood'un önemli yönetmenleri ve oyuncularıyla çalışacağının bir işareti oldu.

Kariyerinin devamında Knapp, genellikle yoğun, karizmatik ve tehlikeli karakterleri canlandırarak kendine özgü bir yer edindi. Antoine Fuqua'nın yönettiği "Son Şans" (Southpaw) (2015) filmindeki Jon Jon rolü, "The Finest Hours" (2016) ve Shane Black'in yönettiği "İyi Adamlar" (The Nice Guys) (2016) gibi filmlerdeki performanslarıyla dikkat çekti. Bu roller, onun güvenilir bir yardımcı oyuncu ve güçlü bir ekran varlığı olarak tanınmasını sağladı.

Knapp, özellikle karmaşık ve çoğu zaman kötü niyetli karakterleri canlandırmadaki başarısıyla öne çıktı. Eli Roth'un yönettiği "Öldürme Arzusu" (Death Wish) (2018) yeniden çevriminde Bruce Willis'in karşısında filmin ana kötü karakteri Knox'u canlandırdı. Aynı yıl, Karyn Kusama'nın yönettiği ve Nicole Kidman'ın başrolünde olduğu gerilim filmi "Destroyer"daki performansıyla da eleştirmenlerden övgü topladı. Televizyonda ise Netflix'in Emmy ödüllü mini dizisi "Seven Seconds" (2018) ve Ethan Hawke ile birlikte rol aldığı, büyük beğeni toplayan Showtime dizisi "The Good Lord Bird" (2020) gibi prestijli yapımlarda yer aldı.

Son yıllarda Knapp, yüksek profilli projelerdeki varlığını sürdürdü. Jeff Nichols'ın yönettiği ve yıldızlarla dolu kadrosuyla dikkat çeken "The Bikeriders" (2023) ve Jake Gyllenhaal'un başrolünde olduğu "Bar Fedaisi" (Road House) (2024) yeniden çevriminde önemli roller üstlendi. Oyunculuğun yanı sıra, Knapp aynı zamanda "The Long Run" adlı kendi yapım şirketinin kurucu ortağıdır ve bu şirket aracılığıyla filmlerin yapımcılığını da üstlenmektedir. Yoğun performansı ve unutulmaz karakter portreleriyle günümüzün en meşgul karakter oyuncularından biri olarak kariyerine devam etmektedir.

David James Lewis (born 4 August 1976) is a Canadian actor. He played Kevin Mitchum on the PAX series Hope Island in the 1999 to 2000 television season. He played Walt Lawson in the 1999 film Lake Placid. He also worked in The Butterfly Effect 2. Lewis currently plays Richard Allen on CBS's Harper's Island. His next movie will be the Dolph Lundgren directed Icarus in which he will play Mr. Graham. David has had a role in almost 100 movies and shows. He won a Cannes Film Festival award in 2000 for Best short film in the movie Shoes Off.

Description above from the Wikipedia article David Lewis (Canadian actor), licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: David James Lewis

data.biography: David Lewis (* 4. August 1976 in Vancouver, British Columbia als David Fouts) ist ein kanadischer Schauspieler. Seit 1988 war er in mehr als 170 Film- und Fernsehproduktionen zu sehen. 2015 erhielt er einen Leo Award für seine Rolle in der Webserie Lying and Dying.

保剑锋（Jeff Bao），1975年11月3日出生于上海市，中国内地影视男演员、流行乐歌手，毕业于上海戏剧学院。

1996年，出演个人首部电视剧《真空爱情记录》，从而正式进入演艺圈。1998年，在古装喜剧《珍珠塔新传》中饰演男主角方卿。2000年，出演都市情感剧《情怨两代人》。2002年，在青春校园励志剧《十八岁的天空》中饰演男主角古越涛，从而受到关注。2003年，主演古装武侠剧《至尊红颜》。2004年，主演古装剧《秦王李世民》。2005年，主演古装传奇剧《薛仁贵传奇》。

2007年，在都市情感剧《又见一帘幽梦》中饰演男二号楚濂。2008年，推出首张个人EP专辑《万人迷》。2010年，主演都市情感剧《完美丈夫》。2012年，在家庭情感剧《贤妻》中饰演男主角赵伯暄。2013年，主演古装玄幻剧《华胥引之绝爱之城》。2015年，作为固定嘉宾参加云南卫视军事竞技真人秀节目《士兵突击之勇者奇兵》的录制。2016年，主演古装神话剧《朝歌》。2017年，主演古装武侠剧《新龙门客栈》。
data.name: 保剑锋

data.biography: Bảo Kiếm Phong (3/11/1975) là một nam ca sĩ, diễn viên tài hoa của Trung Quốc. Ông tham gia đóng phim lần đầu tiên vào năm 1996 trong Chân Không Ái Tình Ký Lục, từ đó chính thức gia nhập làng giải trí Hoa ngữ. Những tác phẩm phim ảnh nổi bật của Bảo Kiếm Phong có thể kể đến như Bầu Trời Của Năm 18 Tuổi, Hiền Thê, Hồng Nhan Chí Tôn, Tần Vương Lý Thế Dân,...

保劍鋒（Jeff Bao），1975 年 11 月 3 日出生於上海市，中國內地影視男演員、流行樂歌手，畢業於上海戲劇學院。

1996 年，出演個人首部電視劇《真空愛情記錄》，從而正式進入演藝圈 。1998 年，在古裝喜劇《珍珠塔新傳》中飾演男主角方卿。2000 年，出演都市情感劇《情怨兩代人》。2002 年，在青春校園勵志劇《十八歲的天空》中飾演男主角古越濤，從而受到關注。2003 年，主演古裝武俠劇《至尊紅顏》。2004 年，主演古裝劇《秦王李世民》。2005 年，主演古裝傳奇劇《薛仁貴傳奇》 。

2007 年，在都市情感劇《又見一簾幽夢》中飾演男二號楚濂 。2008 年，推出首張個人 EP 專輯《萬人迷》 。2010 年，主演都市情感劇《完美丈夫》。2012 年，在家庭情感劇《賢妻》中飾演男主角趙伯暄 。2013 年，主演古裝玄幻劇《華胥引之絕愛之城》 。2015 年，作為固定嘉賓參加雲南衞視軍事競技真人秀節目《士兵突擊之勇者奇兵》的錄製 。2016 年，主演古裝神話劇《朝歌》 。2017 年，主演古裝武俠劇《新龍門客棧》 。
data.name: 保劍鋒

data.biography: 中国内地男演员，籍贯北京。主要代表作品有《爱情自有天意》、《李小环与苗翠花》、《家仇》、《换子成龙》、《冷枪》、《武昌首义》、《贞观长歌》、《镜海风云》、《红幡》、《美人关》、《锁梦楼》、《隋唐演义》等诸多内地热播剧。2019年参演大热古装剧《长安十二时辰》，在剧中饰演韩荆州韩朝宗。2020年在播出豆瓣高分剧集《沉默的真相》中饰演孙传福一角。
data.name: 闵政

data.biography: 中國內地男演員，籍貫北京。主要代表作品有《愛情自有天意》、《李小環與苗翠花》、《家仇》、《換子成龍》、《冷槍》、《武昌首義》、《貞觀長歌》、《鏡海風雲》、《紅幡》、《美人關》、《鎖夢樓》、《隋唐演義》等諸多內地熱播劇。2019 年參演大熱古裝劇《長安十二時辰》，在劇中飾演韓荊州韓朝宗。2020 年在播出豆瓣高分劇集《沉默的真相》中飾演孫傳福一角。
data.name: 閔政

data.biography: Yue Dongfeng, film and television actor, former unit of the Warrior Art Troupe of Wenshan Military Region, participated in the TV series "Shuanglong Biography" TV series "Dragon World" TV series "World Road" TV series " Darts in the World " TV series "Gun Showers" and many other film and television works
data.name: Yue Dongfeng

data.name: 岳冬峰

data.biography: 中國內地影視男演員。原單位文山軍區戰士藝術團。
data.name: 嶽冬峰

data.biography: هو ممثل سينمائي وتلفزيوني صيني، عُرف بمشاركته في العديد من الأعمال الدرامية والأفلام التي تتنوع بين الأكشن والدراما التاريخية.يتمتع يوي دونغ فينغ بمسيرة حافلة، حيث شارك في أكثر من 30 عملاً فنياً. تتسم أدواره غالباً بالقوة، وقد ظهر في العديد من أفلام الفنون القتالية (الأكشن) والدراما البوليسية.
data.name: يوي دونغ فينغ
